commands.review_summary:
The PR adds structured Doctor lint findings and dry-run repair effects for config-audit scrub work while keeping the existing Doctor scrub path as the real mutating path.

PR surface: Source +4, Tests +577, Docs +2. Total +583 across 12 files.

Reproducibility: not applicable. this is a Doctor feature PR rather than a bug report. Source review verifies the proposed code path, but the contributor has not supplied real CLI behavior proof.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Manual review is needed because the PR is protected, draft, stacked on an open base PR, and blocked on contributor real behavior proof plus maintainer acceptance of the warning/security posture.

target.title: Doctor: expose config audit scrub findings
target.body:
## Summary

- Exposes historical config-audit argv redaction cleanup as structured doctor health findings.
- Adds dry-run repair effects for the planned audit-log scrub.
- Keeps the existing doctor:config-audit-scrub legacy run path as the only real mutating scrub path for normal doctor / doctor --fix.
- Declares the structured check inline on the existing ordered doctor contribution, so this PR does not add another core registry entry.

This is intentionally the small config-audit slice from the older doctor repair stack. It does not migrate cron, crontab handling, session state, or plugin-sensitive doctor rules.

## Stack

Stacked on #86627. The only new config-audit commit in this PR is f0cfbe80d1; the config-audit delta is 4 files.

## Validation

- `git diff --check`
- `node node_modules/oxfmt/bin/oxfmt --check --threads=1 src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.ts src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node node_modules/oxlint/bin/oxlint --tsconfig config/tsconfig/oxlint.core.json src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.ts src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p test/tsconfig/tsconfig.core.test.json --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-tsgo.mjs -p tsconfig.core.json --noEmit --incremental false --pretty false`
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/commands/doctor-config-audit-scrub.test.ts src/flows/doctor-health-contributions.test.ts --reporter=dot --pool=forks --testTimeout=30000 --hookTimeout=30000` (2 files, 38 tests)
target.author: giodl73-repo

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
